calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Dec-24-2025 Set For Trial On Feb-22-27 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Enforce The Courts Order Of February 24, 2026, Compelling Plaintiff Amanda Raischs Responses To: Form Interrogatories, Set One; Request For Production, Set One; And Request For Sanctions; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support
Off Calendar Apr-08-2026 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Plaintiff Amanda Raischs Responses To: Form Interrogatories, Set One; Request For Production, Set One; And Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar Feb-24-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
Ricardo Chavez, Esq. The Injury Firm APC 949-652-2438 for Plaintiff.
Terrence Heaslett, Esq. 925-222-3400 Wood Smith Henning & Berman LLP for Defendant.

ARGUED. Mr. Chavez contests and presents argument on Form Interrogatories and sanctions.
Mr. Heaslett states responses are unresponsive and states case law. Counsel requests 20 days to provide responses. After full argument, the Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANTs DAVIDSON HOTEL COMPANY LLC, and DONS LESSEE LLC.'s Motion To Compel Plaintiff Amanda Raischs Responses To: Form Interrogatories, Set One; Request For Production, Set One; And Request For Sanctions.

Granted. Sanctions are taken under submission. Defense' counsel to submit a proposed form of order.

The Court signs an order after the hearing. (see scanned order for details)

Judge: John M. True, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMT)
